song.title: The Battle Belongs to the Lord
song.author: Jamie Owens-Collins
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
;Capo 3 or 4
[V1] . Am E7 G Am In heavenly armor we'll enter the land. . Am G Am The battle belongs to the Lord. . Am E7 G Am No weapon that's fashioned against us will stand. . Am G Am The battle belongs to the Lord!
[C] .F G C G C G Am We sing glory, ho__nor, . E7 Am Power, and strength to the Lord. .C G C G C G Am We sing glory and ho__nor, . E7 Am Power and strength to the Lord.
[V2] When the power of darkness comes in like a flood, The battle belongs to the Lord! He's raised up a standard, the power of His blood. The battle belongs to the Lord!
[V3] When your enemy presses in hard do not fear. The battle belongs to the Lord! Take courage, my friend, your redemption is near. The battle belongs to the Lord!
